title: Building Artificial Intelligence Tools That Speak Nuclear
description: AI tools are starting to streamline and accelerate how nuclear plants are designed, approved, and built.

title: Every Time You Click On Claude, A Caribbean Island Earns Millions Of Dollars
description: Anguilla is a Caribbean island that has .ai as its country-code domain, through which it has been earning millions of dollars every year since the boom of artificial intelligence
content: In the mid‑to‑late 1980s, country‑code top‑level domains (ccTLDs) were established. Each country was assigned an extension code. For example, India received .in, China .cn, Australia .au, and Italy .it, among many others. However, the most interestin... [3246 chars]

title: India sees 60% jump in AI jobs as hiring expands beyond major cities
description: India’s appetite for AI talent is growing at a record pace, with job postings rising sharply and opportunities spreading beyond traditional tech hubs. From large enterprises to smaller firms, demand is diversifying, signalling a shift in how and where the country is building its artificial intelligence workforce.
content: India’s artificial intelligence hiring spree is not just accelerating, it is quietly reshaping where opportunity lives. Once concentrated in a handful of tech hubs, the demand for AI talent is now rippling across smaller cities, hinting at a broader ... [2982 chars]

title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
description: HONG KONG (AP) — China on Monday blocked Meta’s acquisition of the artificial intelligence startup Manus, which has Chinese roots but is Singapore-based.
content:
